title: Cuneiform Tablet #0657: Old Assyrian Ration List
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Ration List document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records ration list matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
